baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. When the full TECH stack is held, loan suppression lifts per industry rules. Founder CEO: draw 2 personal event cards, keep 1 (per CEO once-per-game ability). Non-Founder: suppression lifts; no card draw.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: When the full TECH stack is held, loan suppression lifts per industry rules. Founder CEO: draw 2 personal event cards, keep 1 (per CEO once-per-game ability). Non-Founder: suppression lifts; no card draw.

flavourText: Recurring revenue is the closest thing to immortality.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active. Founder CEO: MID alone suffices to activate UPSTREAM integration per CEO ability.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Once integration is active on the UPSTREAM asset you own, treat that asset's value roll as one higher.
+1 loan cap on this asset if full vertical stack is held.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 12.

flavourText: Every platform is a tollbooth with better UX.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active (loan suppression lifted per industry rules).

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 to this asset's loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue once vertical integration is active (loan suppression lifted per industry rules). Financing depth unlocks with proven integration, not before.

flavourText: The foundation nobody sees until it breaks.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active. Stack complete: once per year, draw 1 personal event card, keep or sell. Founder's once-per-game stack bonus activates here.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Stack complete: once per year, draw 1 personal event card, keep or sell. Founder's once-per-game stack bonus activates here.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 22.

flavourText: Enterprise software: where innovation goes to get a salary.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Value cannot fall below 8 from any single roll.
Treat all positive value roll deltas as +1 higher when full stack is owned.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if this asset's current value exceeds 18 and integration is active.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each ENERGY asset you own (max +2).

flavourText: The cloud is just someone else's data centre — and someone else's debt.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active. Stack complete: +1 to loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on all owned TECH assets (applies once integration is active per industry rules). Growth-to-leverage conversion: on a roll of 6, you may instead gain +2 permanent loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on this asset rather than applying the value delta. Activates only while integration is active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Stack complete: +1 to loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on all owned TECH assets. Growth-to-leverage conversion: on a roll of 6, you may instead gain +2 permanent loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on this asset rather than applying the value delta. Only while integration is active.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if value exceeds 32.

flavourText: Monopoly is just network effects with better lawyers.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +3 additional if value exceeds 30 and integration is active.

flavourText: At this scale, the model trains itself — and so does the debt.
